requirement_text: Release gate subcommand shall be registered under release parent command
Release gate shall filter requirements by sprint column matching target version
Release gate shall exit 1 with warning when no requirements assigned to version
target_value: Clear warning message on empty version

requirement_text: Release gate shall exit 0 when all assigned requirements are COMPLETE
target_value: Success message and zero exit code

requirement_text: Release gate shall exit 1 with table of incomplete requirements when any are not COMPLETE
Release gate shall accept --json flag for machine-readable output
target_value: Valid JSON with pass/fail and requirement list

requirement_text: All existing tests shall continue to pass after adding release gate
target_value: go test ./... exits 0 with no regressions
